entries.name: Moor's Hunger — the Heath is waking; the famished Moor that broke the Reach is one sign, and something older stirs under the heather [campaign spine]
The barrows wake — Howe-Stirring; the Crossing's Working cracked the old howe-seals and the restless dead are rising on the eastern heath [clock 0/4]
The Crossing — ~8 million New Yorkers torn into Hethrun in one black second; what did it, and is there a way home?
Find your people — brother Akhil and the friends/family the Crossing may have scattered into Hethrun
The drift-come scatter east — survivors of the Reach disperse along the Stonebay road, prey for slavers and Ranulf's agents; your people are out there, unprotected
Stonebay traffics in strangers — you're walking east, into the duchy that wanted to buy the drift-come; Ranulf's reach grows the closer you get
The stranger who does magic — you cast light and walls before a hundred witnesses; word of a drift-come with power is now spreading, and the realm fears sorcerer-strangers as demons
Sefa, unmoored — a Crown guard who walked off her post beside a stranger; what she is now, and whether she stays
